arguments.expression: console.log('=== Comprehensive Canvas Test ==='); try { const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); console.log('✅ Canvas element created:', !!canvas); console.log('Canvas width:', canvas.width); console.log('Canvas height:', canvas.height); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); console.log('✅ 2D context obtained:', !!ctx); if (ctx) { console.log('fillRect method:', typeof ctx.fillRect); console.log('fillText method:', typeof ctx.fillText); console.log('measureText method:', typeof ctx.measureText); console.log('fillStyle property:', ctx.fillStyle); console.log('Testing fillRect...'); ctx.fillRect(10, 10, 50, 50); console.log('Testing fillText...'); ctx.fillText('Hello Canvas!', 20, 30); console.log('Testing measureText...'); const metrics = ctx.measureText('Test'); console.log('Text width:', metrics.width); } console.log('Testing toDataURL...'); const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL(); console.log('✅ toDataURL result:', dataUrl.substring(0, 50) + '...'); console.log('Canvas implementation working!'); } catch (e) { console.log('❌ Error:', e.message); }
